subject: Lorenzo Antonio Batrez Vargas
summary: Lorenzo Antonio Batrez Vargas, 32, Mexican national and longtime Flagstaff resident, died August 31, 2025, approximately 4 weeks after entering ICE custody at Central Arizona Correctional Complex, Florence, AZ. Died at Mountain Vista Medical Center, Mesa. Had serious pre-existing conditions: diabetes (elevated blood sugar, recent hospitalization), active left foot wound, prior toe amputations (3 toes, left foot). Intake screening documented substantially elevated blood sugar, blood and glucose in urine. Prescribed insulin (long and short-acting), wound care. ICE confirms COVID-19 positive test. Family alleges died from COVID-19 complications without adequate medical care; ICE denies allegations, claims proper care and isolation provided. Official cause of death: 'unknown and under investigation' (autopsy pending, 90-day timeline). Hospital transport before death suggests medical emergency. Death was 12th in ICE custody in 2025 (deadliest year since 2020). Arizona Democratic lawmakers demanded investigation. Florence Project has documented years of medical neglect pattern at facility. High-risk patient (diabetes + diabetic foot disease + COVID-19) likely required intensive management. Assessment: LIKELY PREVENTABLE with proper care. Key gaps: detailed medical records, COVID treatment specifics, timeline of deterioration, autopsy results.
